Spelling Bee Hints

Thursday, March 19, 2026

Hint 1 — Word Lengths

How many words of each length are there?

4
1 word
5
5 words
6
2 words
8
2 words

Hint 2 — Starting Letters

How many words start with each letter?

A
1 word
R
1 word
S
5 words
T
3 words
